textByHashes.f363b2cd0a0e79ef9eacd98d7352635dd89d2b36: What? Oh, hello. I was deep in thought. Did you want me to show you the prices of weapons and armour?
textByHashes.ea0f86ac34a06456b8b8a11409ccc12192056b7b: Sorry, I'm just deep in thought. I'm waiting for many deals to complete today.
textByHashes.e0abbb214b17f447dbcd7a7bbd6860371379cfee: Good old weapons and armour! My people - dwarves, you understand - are hoping I can trade with humans.
textByHashes.3cd1cd5d100c9c459569d6a71a9ba09f8957bde5: I have indeed, my friend. Now, can I help you?
textByHashes.530dda48c7741628039a429aa5969211d49beed2: Hm? Oh, yes. If you don't want to charge your items yourself, you can have the bank attendant do it for you on withdrawal.
textByHashes.1b0ad5931b1b3d4f71a44c08cc8bde1759bf912c: You can tell them how many you would like for each item. Or if you'd like, I can let them know a minimum threshold for all items.
textByHashes.a2fe1e5552c70d40cd8e655ad29974b5fb139344: Thank you, I have much on my mind.
textByHashes.6309f59d2d77ae12839ee83de8890f320316b38e: Oh. That didn't sell so well.
textByHashes.7ca3f19fc22184467b4af1183b61d398c6e15798: Hmmm. If I spend twenty thousand on that, then...
textByHashes.ea15a458a432ba1fe7ab112839f42d2566f245c1: Jackpot! I'm in the money now!
textByHashes.f31420ccf2b8b013f9ddcf3c93bf6fc5ddbc8a36: [laugh][laugh]! Trading the likes of which I have never seen.
